description_long: This is a vibrant red apple with a smooth, glossy skin dotted with small, darker red speckles. The apple features a short brown stem and a green leaf attached near the top, adding a touch of realism. One side of the apple has a large, irregular bite taken out, revealing the pale, slightly textured flesh inside. The surface is mostly unblemished except for the bite and a few minor speckles. The apple is plump and round, tapering slightly toward the bottom. Its overall appearance suggests freshness and ripeness, making it visually appealing in an urban setting.
description: A glossy red apple with a green leaf and a large bite taken out of one side.
description_view_0: Whole red apple with stem and leaf, no bite visible.
description_view_1: Red apple with a large bite taken out, stem and leaf visible.
description_view_2: Bite mark and green leaf both visible, showing apple's interior.
description_view_3: Back of apple with stem and leaf, no bite visible.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large bite taken out, minor speckles
